title: Change in Capitaland Ascendas Reit Management Limited's position in CapitaLand Ascendas REIT
body: Capitaland Ascendas Reit Management Limited executed a transaction for 896,826.0 shares of CapitaLand Ascendas REIT. This increases their holdings from 2,896,022.0 to 3,792,848.0 shares.
reasons: Calculated price (transaction_value/amount_transaction=896826.00) does not match reported price_per_share=2.5646
Inconsistent total value: expected 2299999.96 (amount_transaction * price_per_share), but got 804296874276.00
